description: Configure Chrome for a professional audio mixing bay. Organize sound effect bookmarks into specific folders. Disable Hardware Acceleration and Background Apps to prevent DAW interference. Enforce a global audio mute policy with whitelist exceptions for SFX libraries and block all notifications. Configure rapid downloads to the SFX_Downloads folder and delete cookies for freesound.org and splice.com without removing other session data.
instruction: A detailed Mixing Bay Browser Specification is on your Desktop at ~/Desktop/mixing_bay_browser_spec.txt. Read it and implement all requirements exactly. You must reorganize the bookmarks into specific categories, optimize Chrome system settings (hardware acceleration, background apps), enforce strict audio and notification site permissions, set up one-click downloading to the audio folder, and fix login issues by selectively deleting ONLY the cookies for freesound.org and splice.com while preserving other sessions like youtube.com.
